auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Use the email on your Lextures account. If your school connects single sign-on, those options appear here.
auth.login.ssoAria: Log in with institutional single sign-on
auth.login.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Is the API running?
auth.login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.
auth.login.tooManyAttempts: You've made several failed attempts. Please slow down before trying again.
auth.login.orgNotFound: This organization sign-in address was not found.
auth.signup.title: Create your account
auth.signup.subtitle: One account for your courses, assignments, and messages — whether you are learning at home or through a school.
auth.signup.registerAsParent: I am registering as a parent or guardian for read-only access to a learner's account.
